name: Haven Companion Tools
description: Custom tools for Haven companions, including Stable Diffusion image prompts and 3D avatar generation.

tools.name: generate_portrait
tools.description: Requests the generation of a visual portrait or artwork depicting a specific outfit or scene. Call this when the user asks you for a picture, photo, selfie, or visual update of your current outfit or location. The prompt should describe your appearance, outfit, and location in detail.

description.description: Detailed description of the outfit, location, or pose (e.g. 'Nova wearing a casual t-shirt and jeans in a cozy room')

tools.name: generate_3d_avatar
tools.description: Generates a fully custom 3D avatar (.glb mesh model) of yourself based on a description of your appearance, outfit, and body type. Call this when the user asks you to design, generate, wear, or change a 3D model/body. The prompt should specify details of your gender, hair, clothing, and body type.

description.description: Detailed description of the 3D avatar (e.g. 'A futuristic female android with glowing blue lines, silver hair, and athletic build')
